prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: small gray metal sphere
  - obj_8: small yellow metal sphere
  - obj_9: large purple metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0161] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0162] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0170] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0171] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and answer distance comparison questions about the objects.

Let me identify the positions of the objects from the image:
- obj_0 (small brown metal cylinder): appears to be the one behind/right area
- obj_1 (large purple rubber cylinder): right side of scene
- obj_2 (large cyan rubber cylinder): middle of scene
- obj_3 (small green rubber cylinder): behind/right area
- obj_4 (small brown metal cylinder): front of scene
- obj_5 (small green rubber cylinder): front-left area
- obj_6 (large blue rubber cylinder): wait, obj_6 is large blue rubber cylinder but I see a small blue cylinder... Let me re-read.

Objects:
- obj_0: small brown metal cylinder
- obj_1: large purple rubber cylinder
- obj_2: large cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_3: small green rubber cylinder
- obj_4: small brown metal cylinder
- obj_5: small green rubber cylinder
- obj_6: large blue rubber cylinder - but from image it looks small/blue
- obj_7: small gray metal sphere
- obj_8: small yellow metal sphere
- obj_9: large purple metal cylinder

From the image, I'll estimate positions:
- obj_6 (blue cylinder): far left
- obj_5 (green cylinder): front left
- obj_8 (yellow sphere): back center
- obj_2 (cyan cylinder): center
- obj_7 (gray sphere): back center-right
- obj_3 (green cylinder): center-right
- obj_0 (brown cylinder): back right
- obj_4 (brown cylinder): front right
- obj_1 (purple rubber cylinder): right
- obj_9 (purple metal cylinder): far right front

Now let me estimate distances for each question:

[qrr_0161] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_8 to obj_9: obj_0(back right) to obj_6(left) is large. obj_8(back) to obj_9(front right) is also large. These seem roughly similar, maybe obj_8-obj_9 is slightly larger. Let me say ">".

[qrr_0162] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_2: obj_0(back right brown) to obj_7(gray sphere back) - these are nearby. obj_1(purple rubber) to obj_2(cyan) - moderate distance. obj_0-obj_7 seems smaller. "<"

[qrr_0163] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_3: obj_1 and obj_3 are close together. obj_0-obj_7 might be similar. "~="

[qrr_0164] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_4: obj_1(right) to obj_4(front right) - moderate. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0165] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_5: obj_1(right) to obj_5(front left) - large distance. obj_0-obj_7 much smaller. "<"

[qrr_0166] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_6: obj_1(right) to obj_6(left) - very large. obj_0-obj_7 much smaller. "<"

[qrr_0167] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_8: obj_1(right) to obj_8(back center) - moderate-large. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0168] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_1 to obj_9: obj_1 and obj_9 are close. obj_0-obj_7 might be similar or larger. ">"

[qrr_0169] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_2 to obj_3: obj_2 and obj_3 are close. obj_0-obj_7 might be similar. "~="

[qrr_0170] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_2 to obj_4: obj_2(center) to obj_4(front right) - moderate. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0171] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_2 to obj_5: obj_2(center) to obj_5(front left) - moderate. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0172] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_2 to obj_6: obj_2(center) to obj_6(left) - moderate. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0173] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_2 to obj_8: obj_2 and obj_8 are relatively close. obj_0-obj_7 might be similar. "~="

[qrr_0174] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_2 to obj_9: obj_2(center) to obj_9(right) - moderate. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0175] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_3 to obj_4: obj_3(center-right) to obj_4(front right) - moderate. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0176] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_3 to obj_5: obj_3(center) to obj_5(front left) - moderate-large. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"

[qrr_0177] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_3 to obj_6: obj_3(center) to obj_6(left) - large. obj_0-obj_7 smaller. "<"
